SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-27-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-27-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY LANA AUGUST--PROPERTY MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-27-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NAMJILKHUU, BATSAIKHAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MAG MANAGEMENT, INC. $4,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $145.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,645.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
